title: HeadyMusic — AI Generative Composition & MIDI Intelligence Studio
description: HeadyMusic is an AI-native creative studio applying Sacred Geometry and φ-Harmonic scales to music composition, MIDI SysEx hardware control, stem separation, and multi-DAW collaboration. Free for creators.
ogTitle: HeadyMusic — Where Sacred Geometry Becomes Sound
ogDescription: φ-Harmonic scales. MIDI SysEx integration. Generative composition. Stem separation. Real-time collaboration. The AI creative studio for musicians, producers, and creative technologists.
twitterDescription: Compose with Sacred Geometry. Control hardware synths via SysEx. Separate stems with AI. Collaborate live. HeadyMusic is where creativity meets geometric intelligence.

structuredData.name: HeadyMusic
